description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a prominent rectangular footprint and a moderately pitched, multi-section hip roof in a muted brown color. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral tone, likely stucco or painted siding, with multiple sets of large, vertically oriented windows that allow ample natural light. The front facade includes a small covered entryway with steps leading up to the main door, flanked by symmetrical window arrangements. A garage structure is attached to one side, slightly projecting from the main building mass. The house sits on a flat, grassy plot, suggesting a suburban or residential neighborhood context. Architectural details are minimal, emphasizing clean lines and functional design.
description: A two-story suburban house with a hip roof, light exterior walls, large windows, and an attached garage, set on a grassy lot.
description_view_0: Side view showing the attached garage and a portion of the main entryway, with minimal window exposure.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, symmetrical window arrangement, and the central section of the house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the garage more prominently visible and fewer windows compared to the front.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a set of large windows and the back section of the house, with no visible entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, single main door, and minimal decorative elements
